Our Story

It started
with a beer run.

— true story.

No boardroom. No think tank. Just a local golf course, a missing beverage cart, and an idea called Gopher.

Service Available

How we got here

Born on a golf course.
Built by neighbors.

The spark

A golf day, no beverage cart.

Founders John and Tom showed up for a relaxing round — only to find out there’d be no beverage cart that day. Willing to pay just about anything for a cold one, they had a thought: what if there were a network where neighbors helped neighbors get things done, at the price the customer named? They’d call it Gopher. The next morning, they were first in line to register Gopher, LLC.

1
Day one
The build
2
The grind

Years of getting it wrong.

We studied hundreds of marketplaces inside and out — and even signed up as workers ourselves to find where the real gaps were. The technology humbled us plenty. But awesome neighbors stuck with us through every misstep and kept spreading the word.

Today

140,000+ neighbors and counting.

We went from hard-to-get deliveries to small projects and quick tasks — and kept growing. Today 140,000+ neighbors use Gopher to request or provide deliveries, rides, junk removal, moving, home services, yard projects, and just about anything else the community needs.

3
Coast to coast
New · Gopher Connect
4
What’s next

Introducing Gopher Connect.

This year we’re bringing Gopher to business. Gopher Connect is our business extension to the Marketplace — on-demand labor for when a full-time hire doesn’t make sense but the part-time demand is real.

One marketplace, four ways in

Four ways to Gopher it.

For neighbors

We find someone to get or do anything for you, for a fair price.

Post your task with ease — and before you know it, someone’s already on the way.

— request anything! Let’s go →

For businesses

When your crew is short and the day can’t wait.

Bulk labor, couriers, and skilled pros — vetted to your standards.

— a better way Learn more →

For workers

100% posted take rate. No cut, no catch. Just fair.

The price the customer offers is exactly what you take home.

— paid instantly Start earning →

For merchants

Big apps take 30%. We take $0.

Zero commission. Your customers, your margin, your brand.

— a better way Sign up free →

Our mission

Perfectly connecting neighbors, businesses, merchants, and workers to fair-priced human services.

Our vision

To create the ultimate community marketplace for finding help — a reliable service provider for a fair price.

What we stand for

Five values. Lived, not posted.

🤝

Community

Every decision starts by listening to our neighbors and making their lives easier.

🔒

Transparency

Open, honest communication at every step. That’s how trust gets built.

🥚

Adaptability

Change is constant. We stay agile — observing, learning, moving fast.

✨

Integrity

Doing the right thing matters most — especially when things go sideways.

💬

Humility

The best ideas come from listening. Your feedback shapes what we build next.
